headline: A Look At Mattel (MAT) Valuation As Activist Investor Pushes For Possible Sale Or Merger
summary: Activist pressure puts Mattel in the spotlight Southeastern Asset Management’s open letter urging Mattel (MAT) to explore a sale or merger has pushed the stock into focus, with investors weighing potential ownership changes against the company’s current standalone plan. The activist investor cited what it sees as an undervalued market price and mentioned potential suitors ranging from private equity to competitors such as Hasbro and large media groups, while questioning Mattel’s 2026...
